title: Rayleigh Ends the Standoff
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Yamato, Unknown person #7, Rayleigh, Marines, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as Blackbeard attacks Amazon Lily, the Seraphim appear, and Rayleigh forces a stalemate around Boa Hancock.
scene: Blackbeard attacks Amazon Lily, the Seraphim appear, and Rayleigh forces a stalemate around Boa Hancock.

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Hehehe, that Hancock... what a gorgeous face...)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her head will make a wonderful trophy after I wring her neck!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can have your way with her after we take her powers!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hang on!! Don'tcha think we could...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...have more fun with her if we took her alive:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral!! We need you to give the order to engage Blackbeard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hold fire until we hear from HQ!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm not here for you fleas!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't say I'm surprised. We expected other pirates to want a piece of the former warlords!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Navy isn't looking for a fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you surrender yourself to us, I promise we'll leave immediately!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This "hero" of theirs sure is conceited!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll never submit to another's captivity!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're kidding!! White hair, brown skin...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This kid took all of you down by himself?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on?!

summary: This part advances the Amazon Lily / World Aftermath through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
